embeds.title: Scientists Discover Birds Are Scared Of Women
embeds.description:
Urban birds in Europe consistently keep a greater distance from women than men when approached, revealing sex-based differences in their flight initiation behavior. This finding highlights new dimensions of animal perception and cognition in urban environments.

Source Article: https://besjournals.o

embeds.description:
The Prediction Princess deck is a Yugioh archetype based on ritual and flip monsters based around their boss monster, Prediction Princess Tarotrei.
In DABL, or Darkwing Blast, the Prediction Princess deck gets new support in the form of Prediction Princess Tarotreith, a new Flip Ritual monster.

Lose HP to do stuff and deal big damage, but red is more of an ultimate-centric realm

No, purple is first card of the turn, insight procurement and ultra turns
i dont know the lingo sorry if i make you explain silly stuff
Insight is the special card that gives you one arithmetica and draws one card
Sure chaos lacks a personality but it will just absorb every other realm’s personality at max potential
legit yellow is just there for diversity x.x

Ultra turn is an extra turn where all the cards in your ultra bar gets drawn and they gain exhaust and fleeting which is removed from the deck after use and gets removed at the end of the turn from your deck respectively
Chaos is literally the support realm
oh do they cost less to be played too or not rly?
ig its prolly more about making the exodia turn

Red --> Most of the times you lose hp to deal big damage
Blue -->
Yellow --> Helps in Keyflare Regen and is an all around solid realm. I'm no expert in it to give you much explanation other than that
Purple --> First card every turn is stored and you get an extra turn when you have 5 stored (or more depending on if you have one specific echo on the card you play)
It depends on the character, if a character's cards have leap they gain special effects while in the ultra turn, and if they have quasar they get a -1 arithmetica cost
And then there is the evolved version of blue and ultra
